---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Implementation Ideas
Any thoughts on how this could be implemented. References to specific files or patterns in the codebase are helpful.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples from other tools (Framer, Figma, Webflow, etc.) here.
